home.hero_subtitle: Professional tattoo studio in the heart of Playa del Carmen. We transform your stories into eternal works of art.
home.services_title: We Create Art That Lasts Forever
home.services_tattoos_desc: From minimalist designs to elaborate pieces. Every tattoo is a unique work created for your story.
home.services_piercings_desc: Performed with the highest quality materials and professional technique for your comfort and safety.
home.about_title: More Than a Studio, an Experience
home.about_desc1: Kim Tattoo was born from a deep passion for body art. With over 10 years of experience, we have turned every session into a ritual of personal transformation.
home.about_desc2: We work with the highest hygiene standards and use premium inks to guarantee results that last.
home.testimonial_1_text: Kim transformed my idea into something far more beautiful than I imagined. The detail and dedication are unmatched.
home.testimonial_2_text: The studio atmosphere makes you feel safe and in good hands from the very first moment.
home.testimonial_3_text: I’ve had three tattoos done by Kim and each one surpasses the last. It’s hard to go anywhere else.
home.final_cta_desc: Contact us on WhatsApp and share your idea. We guide you through every step of the process.

footer.tagline: More than a studio, an artistic experience dedicated to personal expression and technical excellence.

translation_unavailable.title: Translation unavailable
translation_unavailable.message: This content is not yet available in English.

services.tattoos_desc: From minimalist lines to complex compositions, every piece we create is a unique work of art designed to tell your story. We use the finest pigments on the market to guarantee vivid colors and exceptional durability.
services.style_blackwork_desc: Pure black ink, clean lines, and sharp contrasts. Bold designs with immediate visual impact.
services.style_realism_desc: Vivid photographs on your skin. Portraits, landscapes, and nature with breathtaking photographic detail.
services.style_geometric_desc: Precise patterns, mandalas, and sacred geometry. Mathematics transformed into body art.
services.style_minimalist_desc: Less is more. Fine, delicate lines that say a lot with little. Elegance in its purest form.
services.style_watercolor_desc: Vibrant splashes of color without defined outlines. Modern art directly on your skin.
services.style_custom_desc: Your idea, our execution. Completely original designs created from scratch just for you.
services.process_step1_desc: We chat via WhatsApp or at the studio to understand your vision, style, and tattoo placement.
services.process_step2_desc: Our artists create a unique sketch based on your concept. We iterate until it's perfect.
services.process_step3_desc: In a clean, comfortable, and professional environment, we transform the design into permanent art.
services.process_step4_desc: We guide you through the healing process so your tattoo looks perfect forever.
services.cta_desc: Message us on WhatsApp and tell us your idea. No commitment required.
services.piercings_desc: Every piercing is a commitment to your body. We use exclusively implant-grade materials (ASTM F136 titanium and implant-grade steel) and rigorous aseptic techniques to ensure your safety and optimal healing.
services.piercing_ear_desc: Lobe, helix, tragus, conch, daith, and more. The ear offers endless possibilities for self-expression.
services.piercing_nose_desc: Nostril, septum, and bridge. Subtle accessories or statement pieces — your choice.
services.piercing_cartilage_desc: Industrial, rook, snug, and forward helix. For those seeking something bolder and more unique.
services.piercing_belly_desc: A classic that never goes out of style. Done with premium materials for a perfect healing experience.
services.piercing_surface_desc: Piercings on flat body surfaces with specific titanium bars for reduced rejection.
services.piercing_micro_desc: A single entry point for a floating jewel effect on the skin. Highly customizable.
services.materials_title: Only the Best for Your Body
services.materials_titanium_desc: The gold standard in piercings. Hypoallergenic, lightweight, and available in vibrant anodized colors.
services.materials_implant_desc: 316L and 316LVM. Durable, long-lasting, and suitable for fresh piercings with proper care.
services.materials_sterile_desc: All our equipment goes through steam autoclave. Single-use needles. Strict biosafety protocols.
services.piercings_cta_title: Which Piercing Is Right for You?
services.piercings_cta_desc: Contact us and we'll advise you on the perfect style and placement for your body.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.desc: The best way to reach us is via WhatsApp. We reply quickly and advise you without any commitment about your next tattoo or piercing.
